prevention_strategies.failure_pattern: Helper functions not integrated with actual endpoints
prevention_strategies.tdd_prevention: Write integration tests that call actual SSE endpoints and verify helper function usage
prevention_strategies.test_pattern: Integration test: POST /sse-endpoint -> verify incremental data -> check helper function calls

prevention_strategies.failure_pattern: Full buffer sent on every SSE event instead of incremental
prevention_strategies.tdd_prevention: End-to-end streaming tests with real SSE connections and position tracking verification
prevention_strategies.test_pattern: SSE stream test: connect -> send data -> verify only new data received -> check position advancement

prevention_strategies.tdd_prevention: Contract testing between frontend SSE client and backend SSE server
prevention_strategies.test_pattern: Contract test: backend sends incremental -> frontend processes incremental -> verify no accumulation

prevention_strategies.failure_pattern: Position tracking logic bypassed by actual implementation
prevention_strategies.tdd_prevention: Integration tests that verify position tracking is used in real SSE message flow
prevention_strategies.test_pattern: Position test: SSE stream -> verify position advances -> verify no duplicate content sent

historical_effectiveness_analysis.improvement_factor: 8.37x effectiveness improvement with proper TDD patterns
